commands.review_summary:
The PR adds message-tool-specific subagent completion guidance, retries Telegram/forum-topic announce handoffs through `message_tool_only`, and propagates message-tool delivery evidence through agent command delivery results.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: the linked issue has live 2026.5.19 logs, and current main returns failure when a message-tool-only completion announce produces only private final text. I did not run a fresh live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is fresh contributor or maintainer live Telegram proof for the current head; no concrete code defect was found for an automated repair pass.

target.title: Fix Telegram forum-topic subagent completion delivery
target.body:
## Summary
- Keeps Telegram group/forum-topic subagent completion handoffs on the mediated `message_tool_only` path.
- Adds explicit completion-handoff guidance telling the requester announce agent to call `message(action="send")` for visible source-channel output.
- Retries once with a forced message-tool handoff when the first announce run returns private final text without message-tool delivery evidence.

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/85070.

## ClawSweeper guidance followed
This follows the issue guidance to preserve the mediated message-tool policy and make the requester-agent handoff deterministically prompt/retry `message(action="send")`. It does not raw-post normal final text as a fallback.

## Tests
- `pnpm exec oxlint src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.ts src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec vitest run src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts -t "retries Telegram forum-topic|requires message-tool delivery for configured channel|reports channel message-tool failure|reports message-tool failure when stale thread" --reporter dot` (8 passed, 98 skipped)

Earlier focused related runs while narrowing this patch:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-announce-delivery.test.ts -t "Telegram forum-topic subagent completions"` (2 passed, 104 skipped)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/completion-delivery-policy.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/followup-runner.test.ts` (61 passed)

## Live proof plan
I will collect live Telegram forum-topic proof from the reporter's live OpenClaw VPS instance on this branch:
1. Temporarily run this patched branch on the VPS.
2. From the Telegram forum topic, trigger a real Codex subagent and let it complete.
3. Confirm the completion is visible in the same Telegram topic and there is no `deliveryStatus=failed` completion record.
4. Remove temporary VPS files/config after proof capture.

## Review note
The local `codex-review --mode local` helper timed out after 10 minutes without returning findings output; the lingering review processes were stopped rather than looping the review run.
target.author: brokemac79
